watchlist.empty: Watchlist empty. Add tickers in <1>Settings → Watchlist</1>.
watchlist.unconfigured: To show live quotes, set FINNHUB_API_KEY in the backend (.env).

table.empty: No assets. Click <1>Add asset</1> to get started.
table.refreshAllTitle: Refresh all values with the current quote (Yahoo Finance)
table.footer: Tip: click a row to see the <1>price history</1>, or <2>↻ Refresh values</2> to fetch the current quote (Yahoo Finance).

flows.title: Contributions — {{name}}
flows.empty: No contributions recorded for this asset yet.

monthly.empty: Add assets to set up contributions.

reforcar.title: Top up {{name}}
reforcar.intro: Record how much you put into this asset. The acquisition cost (<1>invested</1>) always grows by exactly that amount.
reforcar.modeLegend: How to work out the quantity bought?
reforcar.modeManualHint: — if your broker shows a different price
reforcar.modeNoneHint: — adds to value without changing quantity
reforcar.previewNative: ≈ {{shares}} units at the native quote (FX to EUR applied on the server)

chart.symbolMaybeMissing: The symbol may not exist on Yahoo Finance.

asset.searchHint: Search by name or ticker — e.g. NVIDIA, IWDA, EDP

search.placeholder: Search by name or ticker… e.g. NVIDIA, IWDA, EDP

risk.none: Not enough price history to compute risk.
risk.explain: Annualized volatility — how much monthly returns swing. Higher = more risk. Value-weighted; does not model correlation between assets.
risk.explainCorrelated: Annualized portfolio volatility, accounting for correlation between assets — diversification lowers risk.
risk.diversification: Without diversification it would be {{weighted}} %; correlation between your assets saves {{saved}} points.

import212.title: Import from Trading 212
import212.intro: Export your Trading 212 history (<1>Settings → History → Export</1>) and upload the <3>CSV</3> file(s) here. We aggregate the orders into current positions.
import212.privacy: The file is read in your browser — nothing is sent until you confirm.
import212.noPositions: No positions found in the file. Make sure it's a Trading 212 transactions export.
import212.unresolvedHint: {{count}} without an automatic Yahoo symbol — check/edit the ticker before importing.
import212.doneRefreshHint: Values were filled with the purchase cost. Use "Refresh values" to get the current market price.
import212.reviewDeltaHint: Sells reduce or close your existing position; buys add to it.
import212.txnNoChange: No changes — everything was already applied.

broker.title: Connect Trading 212
broker.secure1: Your key is stored <1>encrypted</1> — never in plain text.
broker.secure2: Use a <1>read-only</1> key: Wallet360 only reads positions, never places orders.
broker.secure3: You can <1>disconnect</1> anytime and revoke the key in Trading 212.
broker.notConfigured: Automatic sync isn't enabled on this server yet (missing encryption key). <1>Coming soon.</1> Meanwhile, use the CSV file import.
broker.howTitle: How to get your API key
broker.step1: In Trading 212 (<1>Invest</1> or ISA account): Settings → API → Generate key.
broker.step2: Grant <1>read-only</1> scopes (account, portfolio, history). Don't enable orders.
broker.step3: Copy the API Key (and Secret, if shown) and paste below.

fileImport.title: Import from file
fileImport.moreSoon: More platforms soon. For now, Trading 212 is available.
fileImport.t212Step2: Pick the period (max <1>1 year</1> per file) and export the CSV.
fileImport.t212Step3: Upload the file(s) here. We aggregate orders into current positions.
